creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-01-07 06:25:07 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    dns/opendnssec       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  OpenDNSSEC was created as an open-source turn-key solution for
  DNSSEC. It secures zone data just before it is published in an
  authoritative name server.
  
  WWW: http://www.opendnssec.org
  
  PR:             ports/142103
  Submitted by:   Jaap Akkerhuis <jaap@NLnetLabs.nl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.112     +1 -0      ports/dns/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/dns/opendnssec/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/dns/opendnssec/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/dns/opendnssec/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +99 -0     ports/dns/opendnssec/pkg-plist (new)
